channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump administration designates medical marijuana as a less dangerous drug
item.description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche signed an order Thursday reclassifying state-licensed medical marijuana as a less dangerous drug, a win for pro-c...

item.title: Groups sue Alaska election officials, allege the sharing of voter data with DOJ was unconstitutional
item.description: Voting and civil rights groups sued Alaska elections officials Wednesday, alleging that their sharing of the state's full voter registration list with...

item.title: The SPLC Is A Hedge Fund With A Dumb Anti-Racism Newsletter
item.description: At the SPLC, Moser wrote, staff joked that they would keep at their work 'Until justice rolls down like dollars.'

item.title: How Liberal Justices Used A Footnote To Drag Out Dobbs Release Amid Assassination Threats
item.description: After the Dobbs decision overturning Roe v. Wade was leaked in May of 2022, Justice Samuel Alito warned his colleagues that delaying its official rele...

item.title: Discovering Raimundo de Madrazo and Spain’s Sparkling 19th Century
item.description: The Meadows Museum in Dallas shows us there’s lots happening in Spanish art between Goya and Picasso.

item.title: What Business Do Democrats Have in Barcelona?
item.description: Why would they cozy up to ‘global progressives’ in a faraway leftist enclave?

item.title: National Republicans Dodge Questions About VA Ground Game As Locals Allege ‘None Of Them Spent Any Money’
item.description: In short, Virginia’s statewide election was a national election. The only problem, frustrated Republicans say, the GOP didn’t get that.

item.title: Manufacturing Racism
item.description: The Southern Poverty Law Center has been secretly funding ‘informants’ and infiltrators in multiple white supremacist groups around the country, the D...

item.title: Carney Gets His Free Hand
item.description: The new Liberal majority in Parliament will continue the Trudeau status quo, with minor modifications.

item.title: Russiagate Czar Joe DiGenova Is The Best And Last Chance For Accountability
item.description: After a wasted decade, this is both the best opportunity and, realistically, the last real chance to get something done.

item.title: Turkey Is the Weak Link in Trump’s Economic War on Iran
item.description: The nation’s regulatory and commercial environment remains a critical conduit for Tehran.

item.title: Trump ally Justin Sun sues crypto venture aligned with president's family over frozen tokens
item.description: Cryptocurrency champion Justin Sun is suing World Liberty Financial, a company founded by President Trump and his sons.

item.title: Houston changes ordinance limiting cooperation with ICE after pressure from governor
item.description: A Houston city ordinance that limited police officers' cooperation with federal immigration agents was amended on Wednesday after Texas' governor thre...

item.title: The Media Weren’t ‘Truth-Seeking’ Under Biden, So Why Should We Take Them Seriously Now?
item.description: When the Atlantic magazine trots out one of its mostly anonymous defamation pieces against President Trump or one of his allies, it should be conventi...

item.title: Kalshi fines and suspends three congressional candidates for wagering on their own elections
item.description: Three congressional candidates are accused of betting on the outcome of their own elections on the prediction market Kalshi, which said Wednesday that...
